description: Classic VS Code dark theme tailored for an AI dev brain dashboard. Prioritizes ergonomic usability, high contrast, and dense data presentation. No pure blacks, using layered dark grays with VS Code blue accents.

spacing_and_layout.left_sidebar: w-72 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#3c3c3c] bg-[#252526] flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.right_sidebar: w-96 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-[#3c3c3c] bg-[#252526] flex flex-col overflow-y-auto

buttons.primary: bg-[#007acc] text-white hover:bg-[#005f9e] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm data-[testid='primary-btn']
buttons.secondary: bg-[#3c3c3c] text-[#cccccc] hover:bg-[#4d4d4d] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm
buttons.icon: text-[#858585] hover:text-[#cccccc] transition-colors p-1 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#3c3c3c]

inputs.default: bg-[#3c3c3c] border border-transparent text-[#cccccc] placeholder-[#6b6b6b] focus:border-[#007acc] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007acc] rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm w-full transition-colors

file_tree.item: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#2a2d2e] hover:text-white transition-colors group

tabs.container: flex overflow-x-auto bg-[#252526] border-b border-[#3c3c3c] scrollbar-none
tabs.tab: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 border-r border-[#3c3c3c] cursor-pointer text-sm font-mono min-w-fit

panels.header: text-xs font-mono text-[#858585] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mb-3

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for a dense, developer-focused look. Regular weight. Folder, FileCode, GithubLogo, Bug, TreeStructure, Info.

illustrations_and_media.empty_state: Do not use images. Use high-quality SVG Phosphor icons (e.g., FileCode or GithubLogo) sized at 64px, colored in #3c3c3c, to indicate empty states.
illustrations_and_media.logos: Use text-based logo 'Astra Vision' in JetBrains Mono, font-bold, text-white with an adjacent Phosphor icon (e.g., Graph).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors defined. Avoid Shadcn's default zinc/slate tailwind colors. Use the hex codes provided via custom Tailwind config.
Configure Tailwind with the custom colors (e.g., vscode-bg: '#1e1e1e', vscode-sidebar: '#252526').
Add 'JetBrains Mono' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to your fonts in index.html.

The UI is a fixed 3-pane layout taking up 100vh. Ensure `overflow-hidden` on the body/root and use `overflow-y-auto` only inside the specific panels (File tree, Monaco Editor wrapper, AI explanation right sidebar).
Left Sidebar (w-72): Contains a fixed header with the GitHub Repo input, and a scrollable body for the File Explorer Tree. Tree items must use 'hover:bg-[#2a2d2e]' and selected state 'bg-[#37373d]'.
Center Panel (flex-1): Contains a Tab bar at the top (active tab has top border '#007acc' and background '#1e1e1e'). Monaco Code Viewer sits below taking remaining height.

Right Panel (w-96): Contains sections for 'Code Explanation', 'Error Debug', and 'Mermaid Flow Diagram'. Use subtle borders ('#3c3c3c') to separate these sections vertically. Use uppercase tracking-wider headers.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='repo-input'`, `data-testid='fetch-repo-btn'`, `data-testid='file-node'`).
Do not use card rounded corners larger than `rounded-sm`. The VS Code aesthetic is sharp and rectangular.
Apply custom thin scrollbar classes across all scrollable areas.
